name: 8ct Tabbed Plastic Index Dividers with Pockets - up&up™: Multicolor 3 Hole Punched Binder Dividers
description:
Bring convenience to your home or school document organization with this Eight-Count Tabbed Plastic Index Dividers with Pockets from up&up™. This pack of eight index dividers comes in varying colors to help keep your papers sorted and easy to identify. This pack of colored index dividers with pockets organizes your three-ring binder and includes customizable tabs.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
